message.kilagraphdemo.drone_no_field: No fertile soil beneath the station — place Fertile Soil directly below it.
message.kilagraphdemo.drone_scored: Drone solution scored: %s points (median of %s runs).
message.kilagraphdemo.upload_limit: Upload limit reached (%s). Delete one of your works first.
drone.move.tooltip: Move one cell in the chosen direction. Costs %s ticks.
drone.move_to.tooltip: Fly straight to the absolute target cell (x, z). Distance-based: 4 ticks per cell traveled.
drone.plant.tooltip: Plant a pumpkin seed on the current cell. Costs %s ticks.
drone.harvest.tooltip: Harvest a ripe pumpkin (or whole merged block) at the current cell, banking its score. Costs %s ticks.
drone.clear.tooltip: Clear whatever occupies the current cell (crop or rotten pumpkin). Costs %s ticks.
drone.wait.tooltip: Idle the drone for the given number of ticks, letting pumpkins grow.
drone.pos.tooltip: Reports the drone's current cell coordinates (x, z).
drone.scan.tooltip: Inspects a cell: plantable, ripe, rotten, and merge size. Mode RELATIVE uses dx/dz offset from the drone; Mode ABSOLUTE uses x/z field coordinates (same space as Move To).
drone.score.tooltip: Reports the run's banked score so far.
drone.print.tooltip: Append a value to the run log, shown in the UI Log Panel.
kilagraphdemo.ui.common.like.tooltip: Like or remove your like from this shared work.
kilagraphdemo.ui.hologram.new.tooltip: Create a new blank local hologram work.
kilagraphdemo.ui.hologram.sort_liked.too: Sort the server list by most-liked first.
kilagraphdemo.ui.hologram.sort_new.toolt: Sort the server list by newest first.
kilagraphdemo.ui.hologram.sort_old.toolt: Sort the server list by oldest first.
kilagraphdemo.ui.hologram.mine.tooltip: Show only works you have uploaded.
kilagraphdemo.ui.hologram.download.toolt: Download this shared work into your local list.
Permanently delete this work from the server.
kilagraphdemo.ui.hologram.edit.tooltip: Open this work in the hologram editor.
kilagraphdemo.ui.hologram.display.toolti: Show this work on this hologram block.
kilagraphdemo.ui.hologram.placement.tool: Adjust where and how the hologram renders in the world.
kilagraphdemo.ui.hologram.upload.tooltip: Publish this work to the server so others can download it.
kilagraphdemo.ui.hologram.delete_local.t: Delete your local copy of this work.
kilagraphdemo.ui.hologram.dlg.desc_requi: Please write a description before uploading.
kilagraphdemo.ui.hologram.dlg.limit.body: You can publish at most %s works. Delete one of yours first.
kilagraphdemo.ui.server_hologram.placeme: Adjust where and how this hologram renders in the world.
kilagraphdemo.ui.server_hologram.sort_li: Sort the server list by most-liked first.
kilagraphdemo.ui.server_hologram.sort_ne: Sort the server list by newest first.
kilagraphdemo.ui.server_hologram.sort_ol: Sort the server list by oldest first.
kilagraphdemo.ui.server_hologram.set_dis: Show this work on this server hologram block for everyone.
kilagraphdemo.ui.server_hologram.clear_d: Stop showing any work on this block.
kilagraphdemo.ui.projector.new.tooltip: Create a new blank local slide-show shader effect.
kilagraphdemo.ui.projector.select_work: Select a work, or create a New one
kilagraphdemo.ui.projector.clear.tooltip: Stop shader effect on this projector.
kilagraphdemo.ui.projector.edit.tooltip: Open this shader effect in the editor.
kilagraphdemo.ui.projector.save_meta.too: Save the edited title and description to this local shader effect.
kilagraphdemo.ui.projector.upload.toolti: Publish this shader effect to the server.
kilagraphdemo.ui.projector.use.tooltip: Display this shader effect on this projector for everyone.
Delete your local copy of this shader effect.
kilagraphdemo.ui.projector.download.tool: Download this shared effect to edit it locally.
kilagraphdemo.ui.projector.delete_server: Permanently delete this shader effect from the server.
kilagraphdemo.ui.projector.dlg.desc_requ: Please write a description before uploading.
kilagraphdemo.ui.projector.dlg.limit.bod: You can publish at most %s works.
kilagraphdemo.ui.drone_station.upload.to: Upload the current program to the drone and score it.
kilagraphdemo.ui.drone_station.run.toolt: Run the program from the start.
kilagraphdemo.ui.drone_station.step.tool: Advance the program by a single tick.
kilagraphdemo.ui.drone_station.stop.tool: Stop the program and reset the drone.
kilagraphdemo.ui.editor.aabb.tooltip.0: Display the render bounding box (cull box) for the current radius + placement
kilagraphdemo.ui.editor.aabb.tooltip.1: as a wireframe in the world for 10s. Click again to refresh the timer.
kilagraphdemo.ui.editor.import_obj.toolt: Pick a .obj file to use as the display geometry.
kilagraphdemo.ui.editor.reset.tooltip: Reset the placement to its defaults.
kilagraphdemo.ui.editor.apply.tooltip: Commit these placement changes to the server.
kilagraphdemo.ui.editor.dlg.invalid_mode: Use lowercase a-z 0-9 / . _ - in the file path: %s
kilagraphdemo.ui.editor.choose_png.toolt: Pick a PNG file to use as this texture.
kilagraphdemo.ui.editor.dlg.invalid_text: Use lowercase a-z 0-9 / . _ - in the file path: %s
kilagraphdemo.ui.editor.new_shader.toolt: Create a new shader function resource.
